qualifier: [during the Dance of the Dragons; Myles was greens-aligned, Corlys led the blacks]
evidence_snippet: Ser Myles grew furious when his cousin, Lord Lyonel Hightower, agreed to Lord Corlys Velaryon's terms to end the Dance of the Dragons

qualifier: [greens side; stole Crown gold during the conflict]
evidence_snippet: agreed to Lord Corlys Velaryon's terms to end the Dance of the Dragons, including returning the Crown's gold, as Myles had stolen a good part of it.
